title: langgenius/dify
summary: Production-ready agentic workflow platform with visual orchestration, RAG, MCP protocol support, and multi-model integration. 144,999 stars and 22,818 forks, the most popular open-source agent orchestration platform.
chinese_summary: 生产级 Agent 工作流平台，可视化编排、RAG 和 MCP 协议原生支持，144,999 星+22,818 fork，是 Agent 编排领域最流行的开源平台。
